subcodes.first_line: The Book inscribed by the Pen of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and the Tablet traced by the Supreme Pen—the Pen of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مرقوم من قلم الله المهیمن القیوم و لوح مسطور من ای یراعه من یراعه الله
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
